backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (UserProfile, Couple, planner entries, journal entries, VisionBoard, etc.) and initializing shared state maps with authorization setup via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the 'Add Milestone' dialog helper-text correction on the VisionBoard page to its affected file (VisionBoard.tsx) and associated components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, recent changes, and key behaviors for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, border, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Future Us', mounting the app at #root and loading the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with all page routes, a profile setup modal, a couple-mode badge, and a navigation bar with auth controls for the 'Future Us' app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state, persisting identity across page reloads, and exposing login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend data operations including user profiles, couple management, vision board, daily planner, and journal entries. Also exports a custom CoupleCreateErrorException class for typed error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm cream/amber light theme and a dark theme, plus utility component classes like card-warm and section-title.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CoupleSettings.tsx: Page component for managing couple connections, allowing users to link with a partner via Principal ID, copy their own Principal, and dissolve an existing couple relationship with confirmation dialog and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/DailyPlanner.tsx: Daily planner page with date navigation supporting mood tracking, tasks, schedule items, and water intake, plus a read-only partner view tab showing the linked partner's planner entry for the selected date.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a daily inspirational quote banner, today's planner task progress, vision board goal summaries, and quick-navigation cards to other app sections.
frontend/src/pages/JournalSection.tsx: Journal section page with tabbed interface for four journal types (daily, emotional, night reflection, growth), date navigation, editable forms for the current user, and a read-only partner journal view.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyPlanner.tsx: React page for a monthly planner that lets users manage goals, important dates, budgets, moods, and journal entries for a given month, with a read-only partner view fetched via couple-aware queries.
frontend/src/pages/VisionBoard.tsx: React page displaying a vision board where users can create, edit, delete, and track progress on categorized life goals, with a read-only tab showing the partner's entries.
frontend/src/pages/WeeklyPlanner.tsx: React page for a weekly planner supporting priorities, habit tracking, tasks, and reflections per ISO week, with navigation controls and a read-only partner view.
frontend/src/pages/YearlyPlanner.tsx: React page for a yearly planner covering word-of-the-year, major goals, vision images, and habit tracking across months, with a partner read-only tab.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (warm palette, sidebar, charts), border radii, and box shadows, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and a fix request to revert the instructional helper text in the 'Add Milestone' dialog on the VisionBoard page to the user's original wording.
